tasks.label: dev: all (api + web)
tasks.detail: pnpm dev — starts NestJS API and Vite web in parallel.

tasks.label: test: api (serial)
tasks.detail: pnpm test:api:serial — required for DB-touching tests.

tasks.label: compliance: smoke
tasks.detail: Full compliance smoke runner — run before opening any PR.

tasks.label: prisma: migrate (dev)
tasks.detail: DANGER on main — only run on a section branch.

tasks.label: seed
tasks.detail: pnpm seed — idempotent, safe to re-run.

tasks.label: ship checklist (build + lint + smoke)
tasks.detail: The PR-checklist tasks chained — run this before merging.

tasks.label: PR Watcher (v2)
tasks.detail: Starts the v2 PR watcher via start-watcher.ps1 — pre-flights (main branch + clean tree + gh/claude on PATH), single-instance guard (refuses if another watcher is already running), and child-process reaping (kills only PIDs the watcher itself spawned; never Marco's interactive Claude sessions). Env defaults: AUTO_REVIEW=true, AUTO_UPDATE=true, AUTO_MERGE_POLICY=tests-docs, MAX_TURNS=240. Ctrl+C in the pane to stop.

tasks.label: watcher: tail log
tasks.detail: Live tail of the newest PR-watcher log file.

tasks.label: branch: prune (remote + local)
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -File scripts/branch-prune.ps1; git fetch --prune; git branch -vv | Select-String ': gone]' | ForEach-Object { git branch -D ($_.ToString().Trim() -split '\s+')[0] }
tasks.detail: Deletes remote branches with merged PRs (skips open PRs + main), then force-deletes local branches whose upstream is gone (catches squash-merged branches). Uses Windows PowerShell 5.1. NEVER run while the watcher is mid-job.
